items.summary: Fix the backend isCallerAdmin method in backend/main.mo to correctly authenticate the owner principal '7cho6-twidd-xljev-okmzv-oebuv-llwo6-5tmzy-3n3pb-4nhg5-54713-aae' and return true when this principal makes the admin check call

Add comprehensive backend logging in the isCallerAdmin method to output the exact principal comparison: log the caller principal as text, the stored owner principal as text, whether they are equal, and the data types being compared

Verify the owner principal initialization in backend/main.mo is correctly storing the admin token from initialization arguments and confirm the stored principal matches '7cho6-twidd-xljev-okmzv-oebuv-llwo6-5tmzy-3n3pb-4nhg5-54713-aae'

Update the frontend App.tsx admin route to display more detailed debug information when access is denied, including the raw backend response, any error messages, and the exact boolean comparison result
